text.title: Hexagonal Architecture (Ports and Adapters) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the arch-pattern-hexagonal methodology end-to-end.

step.name: list-drivers
step.action: Enumerate every way the application is triggered (HTTP, CLI, queue, scheduled job).

step.name: list-driven
step.action: Enumerate every outbound dependency the application touches (DB, external API, file system, queue producer).

step.name: define-ports
step.action: Define a port interface per concern; inbound = use case interface; outbound = repository/gateway interface.
step.decision-gate: If two drivers can share a port, share it; if outputs differ, separate.

step.name: implement-adapters
step.action: One adapter per (port, technology) pair; framework code lives only inside adapters.

step.name: wire-lint
step.action: Configure importlinter/archunit contract: domain<-application; adapters can depend on application; no inverse imports.
step.decision-gate: If lint not available for stack, block — adopt one first.
